Label: Glossary
Issue: lacks definition of FPGA.
Correction: Expand the glossary to include "FPGA."

Label: FR-A-30
Issue: does not specify recovery or program state when selection is improper.
Correction: ... Improper Selection is undone and the previous state before the selection is still valid.

Label: FR-A-40
Issue: does not specify the behavior if user tries to start multiple inference instances simultaneously
Correction: ... or an inference is already started.

Label: FR-U-20

Correction: refer to FR-A-10

Label: FR-U-30
Issue: does not refer to behavior specifying requirement.
Correction: refer to PD20

Label: FR-U-40
Issue: does not specify if the listed hardware are all available and how it's updated.
Correction: The system shall display an error message and prevent the selection of unavailable hardware components

Issue: does not refer to behavior specifying requirement.
Correction: refer to FR-A-10

Issue: does not refer to behavior specifying requirement.
Correction: refer to PD10

Label: FR-U-80
Issue: does not refer to behavior specifying requirement.
Correction: refer to FR-A-40

Label: FR-U-80
Issue: does not specify the behavior if the inference fails.
Correction: If inference fails the program returns to parameter selection state and the error is printed as specified in FR-A-70.

Label: FR-U-100
Issue: does not refer to behavior specifying requirement.
Correction: refer to PD30

Label: FR-U-100
Issue: does not specify the behaviour if user tries to view results without running an inference
Correction: The system shall disable the 'View results' button until an inference has been run, analogous to FR-A-40.

Label: FR-U-110
Issue: does not specify the behaviour if user tries to export results without running an inference
Correction: The system shall disable the 'Export results' button until an inference has been run, analogous to FR-A-40.

Label: PD20
Issue: does not specify the maximum number of neural networks that can be imported
Correction: The system shall allow importing up to 10 neural networks simultaneously.

Label: PD20
Issue: does not specify what kind of topology is supported
Correction: The system shall allow importing only such topologies with nodes consisting: Relu, Abs, SoftMax, MaxPool, Flatten and Convolutional

Label: PD40
Issue: does not specify the maximum size of the runtime log file.
Correction: The system shall limit the runtime log file size to 10MB and create new log files when the limit is reached.

Label: Section 8
Issue: does not specify the performance requirements for the system.
Correction: Inference should not take longer than 10 seconds for each image

Label: N/A
Issue: does not mention that neural networks should be trained for image processing
Correction: The imported neural network topologies should be specifically crafted for image processing

Label: FR-U-120
Issue: does not specify the behaviour if user tries abort while there is no running inference
Correction: The 'Abort' button will be only clickable when inference is running

Label: PD10
Issue: does not specify the limit for images
Correction: ...Max. 100 images per inference run

Label: Section 3.2
Issue: does not mention the loading animation while inference is running
Correction: Loading animation will be shown after starting the inference.
